title: Silvinula humifusa

The family Podostemaceae is part of the order Podostemales, which is an ancient lineage of flowering plants. The order Podostemales is a part of the clade angiosperms, which is a group of flowering plants. The clade angiosperms is further divided into two main groups: monocots and eudicots, with Podostemales being part of the eudicots. This classification reflects the unique evolutionary history and adaptations of Silvinula humifusa and its relatives.
